lines.speaker: Krato
lines.text: Hello, how can I help you?

lines.speaker: Krato
lines.text: My name is Krato. I'm an assistant librarian for the Historical Archive.

lines.speaker: Krato
lines.text: This is the Library Historical Archive. Here you'll find historical documents and texts from all eras of Great Kourend's history, dating all the way back to the first decade.

lines.speaker: Krato
lines.text: If you're looking for something specific you should speak to Istoria.
